_doc: Recipe-driven scenarios against the in-tree mock-fs CLI. The CI `mock-scenario` job runs them via the v2 dispatcher on any host — no Windows / VM / WinFsp needed.

v2-recipe-host-only._doc: Multi-step recipe: every step runs on the orchestrator host. Demonstrates that consumers can drive sequential ops via the dispatcher without a VM, and that `{scenario.image}` / `{step.path}` substitution lands in the resolved command.
